name: runbook-auto-reconcile
description: Automatic runbook reconciliation — compacts entries, detects conflicts, promotes standards, refreshes projections. Runs every 6 hours.
install_instructions: To activate scheduled reconciliation, run: /schedule-add --name="Runbook Reconcile" --type=script --schedule="0 */6 * * *" --command="node <plugin-root>/scripts/lib/runbook-reconcile.js --org <your-org> --all"
